name: bsg-ide

metadata.name: bsg-ide
classifiers: License :: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication

documentation:
# Beamer Slide Generator IDE

A customizable IDE for creating Beamer presentations with multimedia support.

## Installation

You can install BSG-IDE directly from PyPI:

```bash
pip install bsg-ide
```

Or install from source:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/sajeethphilip/Beamer-Slide-Generator.git
cd Beamer-Slide-Generator
pip install -e .
```

## Prerequisites

- Python 3.7 or higher
- LaTeX distribution (TeXLive/MikTeX)
- For video presentations: pympress

## Usage

After installation, you can launch BSG-IDE in two ways:

1. From command line:
```bash
bsg-ide
```

2. Import and run programmatically:
```python
from bsg_ide import BeamerSlideEditor
editor = BeamerSlideEditor()
editor.mainloop()
```

## Features

- WYSIWYG Beamer slide editing
- Multimedia support (images, videos, URLs)
- Syntax highlighting
- Live preview
- Presenter notes support
- Export to PDF/Overleaf

## License

This project is licensed under Creative Commons - see the LICENSE file for details.

## Author

Ninan Sajeeth Philip (nsp@airis4d.com)

BSG_Integrated_Development_Environment.py
An integrated development environment for BeamerSlideGenerator
Combines GUI editing, syntax highlighting, and presentation generation.

modules.name: bsg_ide.generator
documentation:
BeamerSlideGenerator.py
A tool for generating Beamer presentation slides with multimedia content.
Supports local files, URL downloads, and content-only slides.
!/usr/bin/env python3

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.add_source_citation
documentation: Adds source citation to content, either as new footnote or appending to existing one.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.format_source_citation
documentation: Formats source URLs for citation.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.generate_preview_frame
documentation:
Generates a preview frame for different media types.
Returns the path to the preview image.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.get_beamer_preamble
documentation: Returns the correct Beamer preamble with shadow text support

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.get_footline_template
documentation: Returns the correct footline template for Beamer.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.format_url_footnote
documentation: Formats URL footnotes appropriately.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.create_new_input_file
documentation: Interactively creates a new input file with slide content and proper preamble.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.detect_preamble
documentation:
Detects if the input file has a complete preamble by checking for key commands.
Now also checks for short institution name.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.sanitize_filename
documentation: Sanitizes a filename for safe use in file systems.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.validate_url
documentation:
Validates a URL and provides specific error messages.
Now handles file and None directives.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.construct_search_query
documentation: Constructs a Google search query from title and content.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.open_google_image_search
documentation: Opens Google Image search in default browser.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.download_giphy_gif
documentation: Special handling for Giphy URLs to get the actual GIF.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.download_media
documentation: Enhanced version with source tracking.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.update_input_file
documentation: Updates either tex or text file with appropriate directives.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.generate_latex_code
documentation: Enhanced version that handles notes properly

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.process_media
documentation: Modified to handle source URLs properly.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.add_source_citation
documentation: Modified to handle only non-media citations.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.verify_media_file
documentation: Verifies that a media file exists and returns its proper path.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.process_media
documentation: Enhanced version that maintains source URLs.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.handle_missing_media
documentation: Enhanced version that properly handles URL updates in both tex and text files.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.update_text_file_with_video
documentation: Immediately updates the text file with the new video path.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.download_youtube_video
documentation:
Downloads YouTube video and returns file information.
Returns (base_name, filename, filepath) or None if download fails.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.update_input_file
documentation: Enhanced version that properly handles URL updates.

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.parse_media_directive
documentation:
Enhanced parser to handle play directives with both URLs and local files.
Returns tuple of (directive_type, media_source, playable, original_directive)

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.process_input_file
documentation: Process input file to convert to TeX format

functions.name: bsg_ide.generator.main
documentation: Main execution function with enhanced file creation capability.
